message:
feat(ffs-cli): add mount subcommand for read-only ext4 FUSE mount (bd-23n)

Wire up `ffs-cli mount <image> <mountpoint>` which opens an ext4 image
via OpenFs, wraps it as Box<dyn FsOps>, and delegates to ffs_fuse::mount
for a blocking FUSE session.  Supports --allow-other flag; defaults to
read-only + auto-unmount.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
